lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in good condition, reflecting consistent care and regular maintenance. The exterior remains in great shape with only minor signs of wear, such as small stone chips and faint surface scratches. Inside, the cabin is clean and well-kept, though you might notice some light creasing on the upholstery from normal use. Mechanically, it runs smoothly and has been reliable, making it a solid choice for its next owner.
This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior shows significant rust and multiple large dents. The interior has torn upholstery and heavy staining. Mechanical components require immediate repair.

Experience the thrill of a truly pristine vehicle that looks and feels brand new! This car is in absolute mint condition, from its flawless exterior to its impeccable interior. It has been meticulously cared for and is ready to impress its next owner with its showroom-quality finish and perfect performance.

This vehicle is in poor overall condition and is being sold strictly as-is, ideal for parts or a serious restoration project. The exterior has sustained significant wear over the years, including multiple large dents, deep scratches, and noticeable rust on the wheel arches and rocker panels. The paint is fading with significant clear coat failure. Inside, the upholstery is heavily worn with several tears and stubborn stains, and some interior trim pieces are missing. Mechanically, the car requires immediate attention; it runs roughly, and there are several fluid leaks. The tires are near the end of their life. Please expect a vehicle that needs substantial work to be roadworthy again.
The car is in mint condition.
This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant damage and the interior shows heavy wear. Major mechanical and electrical systems are not functioning and require extensive repair.

This vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation, presenting in showroom condition with no discernible wear. Meticulously maintained to an exacting standard, it offers an uncompromising driving experience for the discerning collector. A rare opportunity to acquire a specimen of such peerless quality.

Hey everyone! Check out this absolute beauty! I’m parting with my pride and joy, and let me tell you, it is in truly flawless condition. It’s been pampered since day one and honestly feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! If you’re looking for a ride that’s been meticulously cared for and looks brand new, this is the one for you. I’d love for it to go to a great home where it’ll be appreciated just as much as I have. Come see it for yourself—you’re going to love it!

Presenting a concours-level 2004 BMW M3 (E46), a definitive example of the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six power plant. This specimen features a meticulously maintained VANOS system and a documented, proactive rear subframe reinforcement, ensuring structural longevity. The drivetrain is anchored by a Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox delivering power through a variable M-differential lock. Performance is optimized via a factory-spec suspension geometry and an unblemished set of Style 67 forged wheels. The exterior retains its factory-applied clear coat with exceptional gloss retention, while the interior displays zero bolster wear or pixel degradation on the instrument cluster. This vehicle represents the zenith of the E46 chassis, offering a pure analog driving experience with zero mechanical compromises.
Mint condition. Garage-kept. Original paint. No mechanical issues. Full service records included. Price firm.

Presenting a truly exceptional example of automotive preservation that must be seen to be believed. This vehicle remains in showroom-ready condition, having been meticulously stored in a climate-controlled environment. The exterior paint retains its deep, factory luster with absolutely no swirl marks, stone chips, or imperfections across the body panels. Inside, the cabin remains pristine; the premium leather upholstery is supple and completely free of wear or creasing, while the high-gloss trim and carpets look as though they have never been touched. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, benefiting from a rigorous preventative maintenance schedule performed exclusively by factory-certified technicians using genuine OEM parts. Every feature, from the advanced infotainment system to the climate control, functions with factory precision. This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that defies its age, offering the peak performance and aesthetic of a brand-new car for the discerning collector or enthusiast who accepts nothing less than perfection.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit displays an immaculate exterior finish paired with a flawlessly preserved interior, reflecting a history of fastidious care. Mechanically beyond reproach and aesthetically indistinguishable from its original showroom state, this vehicle represents a rare opportunity for the discerning buyer who demands nothing less than absolute perfection.

Presented for your consideration is an exceptional specimen of automotive excellence, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This vehicle exhibits a showroom-quality finish, entirely free from aesthetic or mechanical imperfections. Every surface, from the refined interior appointments to the flawless exterior paintwork, reflects a legacy of fastidious care and climate-controlled storage. For the discerning enthusiast who demands the pinnacle of pre-owned quality, this motorcar represents a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle in truly peerless, investment-grade condition.

Hey there! You honestly won't believe how gorgeous this ride is—it's basically like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I've absolutely babied this car, and it's in pristine, flawless condition inside and out. It drives like a total dream and looks even better in person. If you're looking for perfection, this is definitely the one for you. Come grab it before someone else does!

This E46 M3 represents the pinnacle of naturally aspirated engineering, featuring the legendary S54 inline-six with its high-revving individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS variable valve timing. The chassis remains impeccably rigid, with zero subframe fatigue and a factory-spec limited-slip differential that ensures optimal torque distribution. Suspension kinematics are preserved to OEM standards, offering precise turn-in and dampening characteristics that reflect its low-mileage, concours-level preservation. Every mechanical component, from the Getrag 6-speed linkage to the cross-drilled rotors, operates with factory-new tolerances. This is a true driver’s specimen in investment-grade state.
One owner. Garage kept. No mechanical issues. Flawless paint and interior. Maintenance records included.

Presenting a truly exceptional vehicle that defines the term 'mint condition.' This car has been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled environment, preserving its showroom-floor brilliance. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish with zero imperfections, protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains pristine; the premium leather upholstery is supple and free of any creases, while the original dashboard and trim look as though they just left the factory. Mechanically, this vehicle is beyond reproach, with a comprehensive service history documented from day one. Every button, switch, and feature functions perfectly. With low original miles and a history of adult-only ownership, this is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to own a piece of automotive perfection that looks, smells, and drives like a brand-new car.

Presented for your consideration is an exemplary specimen of automotive engineering, maintained to a standard that transcends the typical secondary market offering. This vehicle remains in impeccable, showroom-grade condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a history of fastidious stewardship. For the discerning driver who demands peerless aesthetic and mechanical integrity, this acquisition represents a definitive investment in quality.

This exceptional vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Presented in showroom-quality condition, every aspect of this automobile—from its flawless exterior finish to its pristine interior—reflects a standard of care rarely encountered in the pre-owned market. Mechanically beyond reproach and visually indistinguishable from new, this unit offers an uncompromising driving experience for the discerning enthusiast who demands absolute perfection.

Hey there! Are you looking for a ride that’s basically brand new? This beauty is in absolute mint condition and has been pampered like a member of the family! The paint is glowing, the interior is spotless, and it drives like a total dream. You honestly won't find one cleaner than this—it’s a complete showstopper. Come check it out and see for yourself, you’re going to love it!

This E46 M3 represents a superlative example of the legendary S54-powered chassis, maintained to a museum-grade standard. The 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six delivers crisp throttle response via its individual throttle bodies, while the ZF 6-speed manual transmission provides tactile, short-throw engagement. Mechanically optimized with a reinforced rear subframe and a preventative VANOS overhaul, this vehicle remains in peak performance trim. The factory-spec limited-slip differential and M-tuned suspension geometry offer surgical handling precision. Every bushing, seal, and fluid is current, ensuring the high-revving 8,000 RPM redline is accessed with total confidence. A rare, turn-key investment for the discerning purist.
Mint condition. Single owner. Full service history. No accidents. Smoke-free interior. Garage kept.

Presenting an absolute showroom-quality masterpiece that defies its age. This vehicle has been fastidiously maintained in a climate-controlled environment, preserving its original factory luster. The exterior paint is flawless, boasting a deep, mirror-like finish without a single swirl mark or stone chip. Inside, the cabin is a time capsule; the premium leather upholstery remains supple and uncreased, while the interior trim retains its factory-fresh sheen. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach, accompanied by a comprehensive, documented service history that confirms its impeccable health. Every electronic component functions perfectly, and the engine delivers smooth, effortless power just as it did on day one. For the collector or enthusiast seeking a truly turn-key, investment-grade vehicle, this is an unparalleled opportunity.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in pristine, showroom condition, representing a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast. Every detail has been meticulously preserved, ensuring an uncompromising driving experience. This is a peerless example of the model, prepared for immediate delivery to its next custodian.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit represents a rare opportunity to acquire a motorcar in showroom condition, featuring flawless exterior paintwork and an interior that remains in an untouched state. Mechanically, the vehicle performs with the precision of a new machine, having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure absolute operational integrity. For the discerning buyer who demands perfection without compromise, this offering stands as a testament to meticulous stewardship.

Hey there! You’ve got to see this beauty! I’ve babied this car since day one, and it’s honestly in absolutely pristine condition—it still smells like a new car! It drives like a dream and looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I’m sad to see it go, but I know the next owner is going to absolutely love it!

This collector-grade specimen features the legendary S54B32 high-revving inline-six, utilizing six individual throttle bodies and dual VANOS variable valve timing for razor-sharp throttle response. Mated to a crisp Getrag Type-D six-speed manual transmission and a mechanical limited-slip differential, the drivetrain delivers an unadulterated analog experience. The chassis is structurally immaculate, with a reinforced subframe and meticulously maintained suspension geometry. Every component, from the hydraulic steering rack to the pristine interior upholstery, reflects a vehicle preserved in its factory-delivered state.
Mint condition. Flawless paint. Clean interior. Full service history. Runs perfectly.

Presenting a truly exceptional example of automotive preservation. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, finished in its original factory paint which retains a deep, mirror-like luster without a single swirl mark or stone chip. The interior is equally immaculate, featuring supple leather upholstery that still carries a faint new-car scent, pristine carpets protected by original floor mats, and an untouched dashboard. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, having been maintained with an open-checkbook policy and stored in a climate-controlled garage. Every button, switch, and feature functions exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. Included with the sale is a comprehensive binder of service records, all original keys, and the factory window sticker. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to acquire a turn-key vehicle that defies its age.

We are proud to present this peerless vehicle, preserved in showroom condition. Meticulously maintained and displaying an uncompromising level of care, this specimen offers a rare opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a truly pristine driving experience. Every detail reflects an investment-grade standard of stewardship, ensuring that its aesthetic and mechanical integrity remain beyond reproach.
